title: ITALY enforcement action against INPS – Istituto nazionale previdenza sociale (40,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 40,000 on INPS – Istituto nazionale previdenza sociale. The controller allowed citizens to submit forms online and offered a service that populated the forms with data from the national ANPR database. However, the co...
